name: explain-readme
description: Interpret and explain the README of the current GitHub repository in detail.

arguments.name: language
arguments.description: The language to use for the explanation, e.g. 'en', 'zh-CN', 'ja'.

content.text: Please read the README of this GitHub repository and provide a detailed explanation. Cover: what this project does, how to install and use it, its main features, and any important notes. {{#language}}Respond in {{language}}.{{/language}}

name: summarize-repo
description: Give a quick summary of what this GitHub repository is about based on its README.

content.text: Based on the README of this repository, give me a concise summary in 2-3 sentences: what does this project do, who is it for, and what problem does it solve?
